name: Seven Stars Slash - Army Annihilator Hagun
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>七</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>流</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>抜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>刀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>術</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－「<ruby lang="jp"><rb>破</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>は</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>軍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぐん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>」
name_jp_tl: Seven Stars Sky-Style Sword-Drawing Art - "Army Annihilator"
desc: Target 1 face-up monster you control; equip it with 1 Level 7 monster with the same Type but a different name from your hand or Deck as an Equip Spell that gives it 700 ATK, but return that Equip Spell to the hand during the End Phase. When your opponent's Level/Rank 8 or higher monster is destroyed by battle, while this card is in your GY: You can add this card to your hand. You can only activate 1 "Seven Stars Slash - Army Annihilator Hagun" per turn.
eff: Target 1 face-up monster you control; equip it with 1 Level 7 monster with the same Type but a different name from your hand or Deck as an Equip Spell that gives it 700 ATK, but return that Equip Spell to the hand during the End Phase. When your opponent's Level/Rank 8 or higher monster is destroyed by battle, while this card is in your GY: You can add this card to your hand. You can only activate 1 "Seven Stars Slash - Army Annihilator Hagun" per turn.

action: Equips monsters from the player's hand
Equips monsters from the player's Deck
Grants effect to Equip Spell Card
Returns from your field to your hand
Returns itself from Graveyard to hand
